ActionsTermsTC / SCPublicationsEditionsHarmoniseID ConflictsDivergence
Registry / Terms / indicating device (of a weighing instrument)

indicating device (of a weighing instrument)

—Not in VIM/VIML G 18 #03106 · 3 instances

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH No authoritative definition in VIM or VIML.
  2. MEDIUM 3 distinct definitions — harmonise.

Publication instances

3 distinct definitions across 3 publications.

3 unique definitions (each used by only one publication)

Ed.YearPublicationClauseG 18 #Definition
20102006OIML R 51-1:2006T.2.900601
- - part of the load-measuring device that displays the value of a weighing result in units of mass and may additionally display: the difference between the mass of an article and a reference value; the mean value and/or the standard deviation of a number of consecutive weighings
pending
202X2017OIML R061-1:20173.3.303106
part of the load measuring device that displays the value of a weighing result in units of mass and may additionally e.g., display the: • differences between mass of a load and some reference value, • value of the mass of the fill(s) and /or related quantities, • parameters of a number of consecutive weighings
pending
20102004OIML R 61-1:2004T.2.300775
part of the load measuring device that displays the value of a weighing result in units of mass and which may additionally display: The difference between the mass of a load and a reference value; and/or The value of the fill(s) and/or related quantities or parameters of a number of consecutive weighings
pending
G 18 — OIML Term-Usage Registry
